summary: Completed testing of Program Archive feature (P0 + P1). Fixed backend bug with archived_at datetime serialization. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI flows verified working correctly.

fixed.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - archived_at was passed as ISO string instead of datetime object
fixed.fix: Changed datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat() to datetime.now(timezone.utc) in routes/programs.py line 238

fixed.issue: archived_by UUID not being converted properly
fixed.fix: Added UUID conversion for archived_by in supabase_repositories.py

critical_code_review_comments: Archive feature fully implemented with proper route ordering (GET /archived before GET /{id})
Report dialog shows comprehensive statistics: reservations, students, teachers, unique schools
Toast notifications in Czech language for archive/unarchive actions
Proper error handling for edge cases (already archived, not archived, nonexistent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Archive feature fully tested. Backend: 12 tests covering GET /archived, POST /{id}/archive, POST /{id}/unarchive, GET /{id}/archive-report, auth requirements, and edge cases. Frontend: Archive button on ProgramsPage navigates to /admin/archive, archived programs list shows with Report and Obnovit buttons, Report dialog shows statistics and JSON export button, archive/unarchive flow works with toast notifications.

verified_features.feature: Navigate to /admin/programs and verify 'Archiv' button is visible and clickable
/admin/archive page shows list of archived programs
Click 'Obnovit' (unarchive) button on an archived program restores it to active
After unarchiving, program appears back in /admin/programs list
Archive a program from /admin/programs using 'Archivovat' button
Click 'Report' button on archived program opens report dialog with program stats
Click 'Exportovat report (JSON)' button in report dialog downloads JSON
Backend API: GET /api/programs/archived returns list of archived programs
Backend API: POST /api/programs/{id}/archive moves program to archive
Backend API: GET /api/programs/{id}/archive-report returns structured report data

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In routes/programs.py line 238, archived_at was being set to datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat() which returns a string. However, the SQLAlchemy model expects a datetime object for the TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE column. The asyncpg driver threw DataError: invalid input for query argument.
fix_applied: Changed archived_at value from datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat() to datetime.now(timezone.utc)
Added UUID conversion for archived_by field in supabase_repositories.py
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 12 backend tests pass after fix
